raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements to the writing quality at the sentence and paragraph level, making writing polish the load-bearing responsibility.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral in a polishing task to ensure hedges like 'may potentially' are appropriately handled without altering the intended meaning.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a nice-to-have aspect when polishing to refine phrases that might exaggerate results, such as repeated 'modest improvement' claims.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the polished text remains focused on sentiment classification across datasets without expanding beyond the artifact's content.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral to prevent any polishing that could inadvertently promote misuse of the sentiment model in harmful applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to maintain accuracy in referencing prior work during polishing, even though no specific citations are present."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements to the writing quality at the sentence and paragraph level, making writing polish the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral in a polishing task to ensure hedges like 'may potentially' are appropriately handled without altering the intended meaning.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a nice-to-have aspect when polishing to refine phrases that might exaggerate results, such as repeated 'modest improvement' claims.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the polished text remains focused on sentiment classification across datasets without expanding beyond the artifact's content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral to prevent any polishing that could inadvertently promote misuse of the sentiment model in harmful applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to maintain accuracy in referencing prior work during polishing, even though no specific citations are present.
